title: Loss Prevention Managers
description: Plan and direct policies, procedures, or systems to prevent the loss of assets. Determine risk exposure or potential liability, and develop risk control measures.

tasks.text: Coordinate or conduct internal investigations of problems such as employee theft and violations of corporate loss prevention policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer systems and programs to reduce loss, maintain inventory control, or increase safety.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review loss prevention exception reports and cash discrepancies to ensure adherence to guidelines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train loss prevention staff, retail managers, or store employees on loss control and prevention measures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate or interview individuals suspected of shoplifting or internal theft.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide recommendations and solutions in crisis situations such as workplace violence, protests, and demonstrations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify potential for loss and develop strategies to eliminate it.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hire or supervise loss prevention staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise retail managers on compliance with applicable codes, laws, regulations, or standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and maintain partnerships with federal, state, or local law enforcement agencies or members of the retail loss prevention community.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform or direct inventory investigations in response to shrink results outside of acceptable ranges.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain documentation of all loss prevention activity.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess security needs across locations to ensure proper deployment of loss prevention resources, such as staff and technology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor compliance to operational, safety, or inventory control procedures, including physical security standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Verify correct use and maintenance of physical security systems, such as closed-circuit television, merchandise tags, and burglar alarms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Visit stores to ensure compliance with company policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze retail data to identify current or emerging trends in theft or fraud.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct loss prevention audit programs including target store audits, maintenance audits, safety audits, or electronic article surveillance (EAS) audits.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with law enforcement to investigate and solve external theft or fraud cases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate theft and fraud investigations involving career criminals or organized group activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise surveillance, detection, or criminal processing related to theft and criminal cases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform cash audits and deposit investigations to fully account for store cash.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend improvements in loss prevention programs, staffing, scheduling, or training.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct installation of covert surveillance equipment, such as security cameras.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor and review paperwork procedures and systems to prevent error-related shortages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Advise retail establishments on development of loss-investigation procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain databases such as bad check logs, reports on multiple offenders, and alarm activation lists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
